phrases.intent_en: How to book a Budvar brewery tour
phrases.text_local: Jak si můžu rezervovat prohlídku pivovaru Budvar?
phrases.cultural_note: TIC staff often act as intermediaries for brewery bookings; prepayment is common.

likely_response.local: Zavoláme vám tam, platí se kartou předem.
likely_response.translation_en: We'll call them for you, pay by card in advance.

responses.english: We'll call them for you, pay by card in advance.
responses.local: Zavoláme vám tam, platí se kartou předem.

phrases.intent_en: Where to buy the city card
phrases.text_local: Kde si můžu koupit kartu města?
phrases.cultural_note: Czechs use 'karta města' for a city card; counters are typically straight ahead in TIC offices.

likely_response.translation_en: Right at the counter opposite the entrance.

responses.english: Right at the counter opposite the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Is there a Samson Fountain brochure in German
phrases.text_local: Máte brožuru o Samsonově kašně v němčině?
phrases.cultural_note: German brochures are common in South Bohemia due to proximity to the border; staff hand them directly.

phrases.intent_en: When is the next Black Tower tour
phrases.text_local: Kdy je další prohlídka Černé věže?
phrases.cultural_note: Black Tower tours run on the hour; staff give short time updates without greetings.

likely_response.local: Za deset minut, ve tři hodiny.
likely_response.translation_en: In ten minutes, at three o'clock.

responses.english: In ten minutes, at three o'clock.
responses.local: Za deset minut, ve tři hodiny.
